## Checklist

<!-- Delete checklist items that do not apply, or note N/A in the PR body. -->

- [ ] Base branch is `dev` (or `main` for a release)
- [ ] PR includes only related changes
- [ ] App runs locally
- [ ] All relevant tests pass (`npm test`), or this change is docs/config only
- [ ] No relevant lint errors (`npm run lint`), or lint is not set up here
- [ ] Tested main user flow and at least one edge case
- [ ] UI checked on desktop and mobile (if layout changed)
- [ ] No secrets, build files, or unrelated changes
- [ ] Screenshots included for visible UI changes
